component.name: Red
component.summary: Private AI assistant powered by LiteRT, Gemini, ChatGPT and more

description.p: Red is a versatile, private AI assistant that connects to multiple AI services including LiteRT (on-device), Google Gemini, OpenAI ChatGPT, Anthropic Claude, Mistral, Groq, OpenRouter, and any OpenAI-compatible API.

ul.li: Chat with multiple AI providers from a single app
Run local AI models offline via LiteRT
Secure user-space Alpine Linux sandbox environment
Available on Android, iOS, Desktop, and Web
